case_title: JAMES HIDY ET AL VS. RICHARD DAVID ELMORE ET AL

MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON OCT-31-2019 IN 206, PLAINTIFFS JAMES HIDY AND DENISE ZUKOWSKI'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL WAS HEARD. BANYAN PARKER, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFFS. NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT FOUND GOOD CAUSE AND GRANTED THE MOTION. THE TRIAL DATE OF 11/04/19 IS CONTINUED TO 02/03/20 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM PER STIPULATION. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; MATTER NOT REPORTED (206/GLW)
